semantic_boundary: Check that proof-envelope records preserve finite-record limitation language.
interface_contract: Inspect proof target records and return whether limitation and non-claim text are present.
qualification_predicates: proof target has a traceable Lean module
evaluator_policy: Independent proof-readiness validation and human review must agree before default use.
evaluator_independence: Review is separate from the candidate implementation and from the proof authoring step.
route_scope: qualified field use for local proof-record checks
consumer_policy: May support proof-record checks inside the qualified field scope but cannot become the default route.
state_migration: No application state migration is performed by this field.
regression_suite: support-state promotion remains blocked without review
rollback_plan: Rollback to manual proof-record review and preserve the prior proof-readiness validator output.
default_route_blockers: qualified for local proof-record checks only
non_claims: does not prove runtime proof checking
